ValidationRule.description: At a time only site must be active for a contract
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK( Contract__c )) && ISNEW() && Site_Active__c = true && Contract__r.Total_Active_Site__c = 1, true, IF( NOT(ISBLANK( Contract__c )) && (PRIORVALUE(Site_Active__c) = false) && Site_Active__c = true && Contract__r.Total_Active_Site__c = 1, true, false ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: For a Contract, at a time only one site can be active.
